item.g:title: Ultrasonic Pest Repellent – Rechargeable Indoor Outdoor Device for Pets for Small Pets – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: *Features*: *Upgraded Ultrasonic Repeller*:Tired of dealing with the hassle and potential risks posed by bats nesting in your attic,birds roosting on your porch or patio,or mice/dogs lingering through your kitchen,garage,or camping gear? This ultrasonic bat repellent is engineered to be your all-in-one solution,deterring these animals effectively. Creates an inhospitable environment for them and lets you enjoy your space without unwanted guests. *3 Ultrasonic Speakers & 6 Adjustable Ultrasonic Frequencies*:Adopting advanced 8-36KHz ultrasonic wave range and 3 ultrasonic speakers,this pest control device disrupts bats' ability to navigate, interferes with mice communication and instincts, disturbs birds' natural foraging or nesting behaviors,and annoys dogs with uncomfortable high-frequency sounds to drive them away from your property. The 6 adjustable levels let you fine-tune the performance based on the severity of the pest issue or the size of the area—whether you're dealing with a mild bird problem on your patio, a persistent mouse presence in your garage, bats nesting in your attic, or stray dogs lingering around your yard, you can easily select the optimal setting. *900mAh Rechargeable Battery*: Equipped with a 900mAh rechargeable battery, this rechargeable bird repellent offers an impressive runtime of 70 hours, ensuring long-lasting protection without the hassle of frequent recharges. Suitable for indoors and outdoors, whether you're at home or camping outdoor. *Up To 2055Sq.ft Coverage*:With coverage of up to 2055 square feet,this ultrasonic mouse repeller safeguards large areas and can be placed tabletop or wall mounted,making it ideal for rooms,garages,sheds,or even outdoor spots like patios and campsites—keeping pests at bay wherever you need it. *Safe & Humane*:No chemicals,poisons or odors. This ultrasonic bat deterrent offers a humane pest control solution that drives away bats,birds,and mice without causing them harm. Also safe for kids and women. Friendly Reminder: 1. The repeller should be installed at 80-120cm/31.5-47.24in away from the floor and vertical to the floor. The height will achieve the best effect. 2. Clean the repeller with dry and soft cloth instead of strong impregnant,water or damp cloth. 3. Dropping and striking should be avoided. 4. To increase the effect,one room one repeller is recommended. And for larger rooms like warehouses,two or more repellers will be needed. 5. Please don't worried that the mice and vermin will increase at the beginning,because they are trying to run away from your house after hearing the ultrasonic sound. 6. This product is mainly designed for repelling bats,birds,mice and dogs. While it may deter other pests,effectiveness is most pronounced for these four. 7. It is not recommended for pets like:hamsters,gerbils,guinea pigs,tarantulas,chinchilla,and other rodent-type pets. 8. Please use the repeller continuously for 2-4 weeks to achieve obvious results. 9. This device is not waterproof. If you use it outdoors,please mount it under shade. *Specifications*: Product Type: Ultrasonic Bat Repellent Color: White Material: ABS Quantity: 2Pcs Rated Voltage: 5V Rated Power: 1W Ultrasonic Frequency: 8-36KHz, 6 Adjustable Levels Coverage: Within 90 Sq.m/2055 Sq.ft Built-in Battery: 1Pc 3.7V 900mAh Polymer Battery Charging Time: Around 2H Runtime: Around 70H Charging Cable Length: 29cm/11.42in Per Item Size: 6.5×3×10cm/2.56×1.18×3.94in Per Item Weight: 85g/0.19 lbs 2Pcs Package Size: 13x11x8cm/5.12x4.33x3.15in 2Pcs Package Weight: 240g/0.53lbs *Package Lists*: 2x Rechargeable Bats Exclusion Devices 2x Micro USB Cables 1x User Manual

item.g:title: Wireless Dog GPS Fence – Waterproof Collar with Tracker for Dogs for Dogs – Waterproof Protection
item.g:description: Features: GPS Wireless Dog Fence : Our dog fence system utilizes GPS technology to create a virtual boundary for your dog,which allows it to roam freely with the designated area. Require no physical barriers. With the radius can reach up to 2887ft,our wireless dog fence can cover up to 760 acres and offer flexibility,portability,and ease of use compared to traditional fences. Portable GPS Tracker : Build in a GPS module that can tracks your dog’s location in real time. After binding the dog GPS locator with your IOS Phone,you can start up the prompt tone and follow the route to find your dog on the e-map. The Lost Mode in the Finder APP is very helpful when it comes to getting lost. If you want bind another phone,the GPS tracker needs to unbind with the first phone as the User Manual describes. Friendly Reminder:The tracker function only fits for IOS14.5/SE/6S and newer version. Also fit for iPad 14.5/Pro/Air 2/Mini 4 and newer version. 3 Warning Modes : Once your dog walks out of the boundary,the GPS receiver will beep for 20S,vibrate for 20S and give static shock for 20S. The beep,vibration and shock mode will work by cycle until your dog backs into the established boundary. USB Rechargeable & Digital Display : With the 2000mAh inbuilt rechargeable battery,our dog GPS finder keeps standby for 72 hours(3 Days) after fully charged for 4 hours. The digital display screen is easy to read and clearly reminds us when the receiver needs to be recharged. IPX6 Waterproof & Adjustable Collar : The durable ABS material and IPX6 waterproof level makes our GPS dog fence greatly extends its service life and allows your dog to play in wet grass or rainy weather. With 23.22in max collar circumference,our GPS collar is suitable for dogs of all sizes and weights. You can easily set up the system in different locations,making it suitable for travel or temporary containment needs. Friendly Reminder: 1. Only suitable for outdoors. 2. It’s important to adjust the collar to properly fit the dog’s neck. If you have to cut off some of the collar,please singe the collar end with a lighter immediately to avoid fraying. 3. For long-haired dogs,please trim some hair on your dog’s neck to ensure good contact of the metal probes. 4. It’s recommended to wear the collar for less than 8 hours per day. If possible,reposition the collar on the pet's neck every 1 to 2 hours. 5. Please keep this dog fence away from children to avoid their playing causing unintended electric shock. 6. The tracker function is only suitable for IOS Phones. If the GPS signal is weak,the tracker may not update your dog’s location as quickly as it was. 7. Only when the signal is good,can the receiver work normally. The GPS signals can be affected by environmental factors such as tall buildings,dense vegetation,or bad weather. It is important to consider these factors when setting up the system and adjust the boundaries accordingly. 8. Only when the GPS Font and Water Drop Icon disappear on the screen,can we reset or adjust the radius. 9. Test is essential before putting the receiver on your dog’s neck. 10. Proper training is essential to ensure that the dog understands the boundaries and responds appropriately to the warning signals. Specifications: Product Type: Dog GPS Fence & Tracker Materials: ABS + PU Color: Black Inbuilt Battery: 3.7V 2000mAh Rechargeable Battery(Battery is not for individual sale) Voltage: 110V Boundary Radius: 10-990M/32-2887FT(32FT Adjustment Each Time) Maximum Area Coverage: 760 Acres(Circular, 990M Radius) 3 Training Modes: Beep Mode/Vibration Mode/Static Shock Mode Tracker Supported APP: Fit for IOS Phone Finder Fully Charged Time: Around 4Hrs Standby Time: Around 72Hrs (Depending On Usage Frequency) Waterproof Level: IPX6 Charging Cable Length: 31.5cm/12.4in Collar Length: 59cm/23.22in/1.93ft GPS Receiver Size: 7 x4.8 x3cm/2.76 x1.89 x 1.18in GPS Receiver Weight: 88g/0.2 lbs Package Size: 18145cm/7.095.511.97in Package Weight: 194g/0.43lbs Package Lists: 1 x GPS Receiver 1 x Adjustable Collar 1 x Charging Cable 2x Short Metal Probes 2x Long Metal Probes 2x Short Conductive Silicone Caps 2x Long Conductive Silicone Caps 1 x Test Bulb 2x User Manuals

When it's possible, please repose the collar on the dog's neck every 1 to 2 hours. 2.Clean the collar weekly with a damp cloth. 3.If a rash or sore is found,please discontinue use of the collar until the skin has healed. 4.The bark stopper can only use on healthy dogs. 5.This bark stopper has two different anti bark mode:cyclic and fixed. A:Defaults mode is cycle mode. Under cyclic mode,first triggering is level 1 warning,if the dog continues to bark,then to level 2 warning,until the level 6 warning. B:Fixed mode(The LCD display will show the current corresponding level):You can adjust the level by pressing and holding the M button. The level changes from 1 to 6.And please release the button when you got the levels you want. 6.Not all barking will trigger,sometimes the dog barking is to welcome owner. We distinguished it via identification chip. The product is mainly for bad barking,continuous barking. *Specifications*: Product Type: Rechargeable Anti Bark Dog Collar Materials: ABS+PC Sound Decibel: 75dB Motor Quantity: 1Pc Battery Capacity: 1Pc 3.7V/500MAH, 1.85Wh Lithium-ion Battery(Included) Fully Charged Time: 2Hrs Runtime: About 10Days (Depending on intensity and modes) Input Voltage: 5V Waterproof performance: IPX6 (Can’t be worn to swim) Levels OF Vibration/Static Stimulation: 1-6Levels Suit For Dogs Under 40kg/88lbs Working Temperature: 0℃-45℃/32°F-113°F Standby Mode: 1Min Of Inactivity Protective Modes: Under 2 Working Modes, after the 6th intensity triggering, It Will Enter Protection Mode, Will Stop Working For 1Min And Flashing “0”. 2 Working Modes: 1.With Static Stimulation Function: With Beep, Vibration And Static Stimulation Function, And The Corresponding Red Stimulation Icon Is Displayed; 2.Without Static Stimulation Function: With Beep And Vibration Functions, Correspond Green Vibration Icon Is Displayed Memory Function: 20S-1Min Reactivated, Then Comes To Next Intensity Color: Black USB-DC Charging Cable Length: 63cm/24.8in Adjustable Collar Strap Length: 65cm/25.6in (Can Be Cut) Anti Bark Collar Size: 6.5x3.6x4cm/2.56x1.41x1.57in Anti Bark Collar Weight: 48g/0.11lbs Package Size: 9.5x9x5cm/3.74x3.54x1.97in Package Weight: 156g/0.34 lbs *Package Lists*: 1x Anti Bark Dog Collar 1x USB Charging Cable 1x Test Light Bulb 1x Warning Tag 1x Nylon Strap 2x Long Contact Points 2x Short Contact Points 2x Long Conductive Silicone Sleeves 2x Short Conductive Silicone Sleeves 1x User Manual
